snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: 019f44e0-b6a1-7bb0-a1ca-5fb43b2725c2 Production Ready A Linux sentinel replacement CLEAR
reviewers.independence: An independent adversarial reviewer reproduced the Linux same-name inode-reuse failure, then verified random-generation/content identity and named-path descriptor metadata against replacement bytes and returned CLEAR without editing files. Product Planning independently matched the exact two-path repair hash.

dimensions.summary: The existing vault and Job lifecycle gains one internal coordination root and shared store without a new user route, setting, mode, durable schema or recovery truth.

Data, Job, Sync, Technical Architecture and Playbook owners agree that `.pige/runtime/` is transient, durable Job bytes remain authoritative, and lease identity includes random generation/content plus bounded no-follow metadata rather than inode alone.

Seven exact selectors bind real-process lease recovery, successor/heartbeat/generation fencing, one exact CAS winner, partial-sentinel recovery and independent Job keys only to existing partial PIGE-VAULT-006/PIGE-JOB-002 and E1.21/E2.10 rows.

Development gets one shared Job mutation boundary and deterministic lease/claim failure behavior while preserving durable schemas, idempotency, cancellation, recovery authority and existing public behavior.

Existing Owner, quality, Playbook, legal/dependency and acceptance surfaces absorb the exact adoption; no PRD, Decision, new document, prototype, setting, public API, durable schema or status changes.

verification.evidence: The exact fenced vault-writer and Job claim/CAS candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npx vitest run tests/unit/vault-writer-lease.test.ts
verification.evidence: CON-001 through CON-004 and negative fixtures pass; the independently rerun 1-file / 16-test lease matrix proves generation/content identity, in-place generation drift rejection, current-heartbeat fencing and successor-safe cleanup.

Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,169 claims; one incremental generation-fence selector joins the six existing exact A-slice selectors and only existing partial rows change, while every Requirement, Exit and phase state remains unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass after the bounded Owner/dependency/evidence projection, without PRD or Decision churn, a new governed document, prototype refresh or unrelated contract expansion.

coordination.taskTitle: Per-vault writer lease and exact-record Job claim/CAS
coordination.compatibility: The candidate preserves durable Job and vault schemas, Job/Operation/domain recovery truth and public behavior. It adds temporary per-vault/per-Job coordination plus exact-record CAS, with the complete runtime dependency graph pinned and attributed.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze the exact two-path Linux successor-sentinel repair over the held 23-file A candidate after full, assembled Electron and packaged evidence. Independent adversarial review returned CLEAR; Product Planning synchronized only stale identity wording, one selector and the semantic/current snapshot bind.

nonBlockingRisks: The final lstat-to-unlink/rmdir syscall interval remains a filesystem primitive TOCTOU limit after the exact identity and freshness revalidation boundary.
Other Job classes and cross-file/domain transactions do not inherit atomicity merely from exact-record Job CAS.
The fixed 30-second stale and 10-second update policy must be revalidated before any proper-lockfile update or platform-specific timing change.
Package proof remains local macOS arm64; Windows multi-process, signed and notarized macOS, and broader installed-platform matrices remain open.
